reviews.review_title: Why did you Change it bro
reviews.review_description: One day me and my friend we were trying to play og ac until we found this game we played a lot… but one day when I joined just to mess around with ￼ angler fish ac was gone it became fun monkey horror and I just got mad so I deleted it hoping it to be ac again but it wasn’t still fun monkey horror please let us change to og ac please also 2 stars￼ and also we don’t care if you get sue just do it.

I downloaded this thinking it would be amazing and work really well but I quickly fond out I was wrong.i got on the game excited and pressed random to join a random code it didn’t work I￼￼ sat there for 15 minutes it didn’t work. I left the game and got back on and joined and sat there for another 15 minutes nothing. I uninstalled and reinstalled the game still nothing. I reset my headset, STILL DIDN’T WORK. Thanks for ruining my day and wasting an hour of my life . Please fix this.
It was og animal company until it became fun monke horror and now its just a black screen
I’m not even lying this was one of my dreams for og animal company to come back and this game made it come true the servers work and everything I love this game
i cant join a lobby
